repo.name: Miles Client F-Droid Repository
repo.description: F-Droid repository for Miles Client - a real-time location tracking app for field agents.

apps.name: Miles Client
apps.summary: Real-time location tracking for field agents
apps.description: Miles Client is a mobile companion app for the Miles CRM system. It provides real-time location tracking for field agents, push notifications for lead assignments, and offline capabilities.
